name: ST
title: HL7 v2 ST Data Type
description: A sequence of characters. The ST data type must include at least one non-whitespace character. Leading whitespace is not permitted. Trailing whitespace is permitted but will be removed. The HL7 v2 standard does not impose a maximum length for ST, but individual fields may specify length constraints.

element.definition: A sequence of characters. The value must include at least one non-whitespace character. Leading whitespace is forbidden. Trailing whitespace may be present but is not significant.
